channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: google-ai-edge / gallery
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #1
A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.
Language: Kotlin 286 stars today

item.title: badlogic / pi-mono
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #6
AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods
Language: TypeScript 340 stars today

item.title: freeCodeCamp / freeCodeCamp
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #10

item.title: Blaizzy / mlx-vlm
item.description:
📉 Rank: #1 → #2 (↓1) | ⭐ Stars: 3,588 → 3,799 (+211)
MLX-VLM is a package for inference and fine-tuning of Vision Language Models (VLMs) on your Mac using MLX.
Language: Python 408 stars today

item.title: siddharthvaddem / openscreen
item.description:
📈 Rank: #4 → #3 (↑1) | ⭐ Stars: 19,652 → 21,798 (+2146)
Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.
Language: TypeScript 2,692 stars today
